top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.major_name = 'Finance' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN m.major_name = 'Physics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS finance_to_physics_ratio
FROM member me
JOIN major m ON me.link_to_major = m.major_id
WHERE m.major_name IN ('Finance', 'Physics');

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.major_name = 'Finance' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN m.major_name = 'Physics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS finance_to_physics_ratio
FROM member me
JOIN major m ON me.link_to_major = m.major_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.major_name = 'Finance' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN m.major_name = 'Physics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS finance_to_physics_ratio
FROM member me
JOIN major m ON me.link_to_major = m.major_id
WHERE m.major_name IN ('Finance', 'Physics');

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.major_name = 'Finance' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN m.major_name = 'Physics' THEN 1 END) AS finance_to_physics_ratio
FROM member me
JOIN major m ON me.link_to_major = m.major_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.major_name = 'Finance' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN m.major_name = 'Physics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS finance_to_physics_ratio
FROM member me
JOIN major m ON me.link_to_major = m.major_id
WHERE m.major_name IN ('Finance', 'Physics');

SELECT 
    CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member m JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id WHERE maj.major_name = 'Finance') AS REAL) /
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member m JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id WHERE maj.major_name = 'Physics') AS finance_to_physics_ratio

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.major_name = 'Finance' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN m.major_name = 'Physics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS finance_to_physics_ratio
FROM member me
JOIN major m ON me.link_to_major = m.major_id
WHERE m.major_name IN ('Finance', 'Physics');
